creator: alc@FreeBSD.org
text:
The comment is not incorrect, but it is poorly written.  The word "returned" is being used to say that the function returns a contiguous range of addresses to the free pool, not that the function returns anything to the caller.

Doug Moore has another round of significant changes to the blist code in the pipeline.  See https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12635.  I would encourage you to contact him and suggest that he rewrite this comment.

The blank lines that your second patch removes are actually required by FreeBSD's style guide.  I suspect that the double spaces are eliminated by Doug Moore's latest change.
